subject: Small compact alien figure executing a slashing or diving attack with pink-yellow energy effect
description: A small, compact humanoid figure is depicted mid-attack at a dramatic diagonal angle. The figure appears alien in design — smaller frame, distinctive head shape. A pink and yellow energy slash or blade effect extends from the attack motion. The background is a warm pink-yellow gradient that intensifies the energy of the motion. The attack appears to be a cutting or razor-type move based on the slashing energy visual, though whether the figure holds a physical blade or projects pure energy is ambiguous at this resolution.
